extraction.one_line_summary: BISSEGER Stefan won the 9km Ajman time trial by 7 seconds over GANNA, holding the hot seat for over an hour despite world champion starting late.
tactical_patterns: BISSEGER held hot seat over one hour before GANNA started, suggesting weather conditions remained stable negating late-starter advantage.
POGACAR gained only 11 seconds on YATES in 9km, revealing minimal ITT differential before climbing stage.
DUMOULIN breaking 10-minute barrier post-layoff signals return to form, significant for future stage race GC threats.

rider_signals.BISSEGER Stefan: positive: EF punching above weight in short technical TTs, especially on dusty road surfaces requiring cornering precision
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: world champion losing to BISSEGER on 9km suggests distance too short for his sustained power advantage
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: only 11-second gap to YATES in 9km reveals his GC cushion depends entirely on climbing stage
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: breaking 10-minute mark post-extended layoff suggests full physical and mental recovery for GC contention
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: second at 10:05 ahead of world champion signals underrated short TT capability for GC calculations
